title: Electrical Engineers
description: Research, design, develop, test, or supervise the manufacturing and installation of electrical equipment, components, or systems for commercial, industrial, military, or scientific use.

tasks.text: Design, implement, maintain, or improve electrical instruments, equipment, facilities, components, products, or systems for commercial, industrial, or domestic purposes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee project production efforts to assure projects are completed on time and within budget.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate manufacturing, construction, installation, maintenance, support, documentation, or testing activities to ensure compliance with specifications, codes, or customer requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform detailed calculations to compute and establish manufacturing, construction, or installation standards or specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate computer-assisted engineering or design software or equipment to perform engineering tasks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with engineers, customers, or others to discuss existing or potential engineering projects or products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate or test vendors' or competitors' products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect completed installations and observe operations to ensure conformance to design and equipment specifications and compliance with operational, safety, or environmental standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate customer or public complaints to determine the nature and extent of problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare technical drawings, specifications of electrical systems, or topographical maps to ensure that installation and operations conform to standards and customer requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile data and write reports regarding existing or potential electrical engineering studies or projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare specifications for purchases of materials or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate labor, material, or construction costs for budget preparation purposes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or implement research methodology or procedures to apply principles of electrical theory to engineering projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise or train project team members, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist in developing capital project programs for new equipment or major repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect data relating to commercial or residential development, population, or power system interconnection to determine operating efficiency of electrical systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop systems that produce electricity with renewable energy sources, such as wind, solar, or biofuels.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop software to control electrical systems.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Integrate electrical systems with renewable energy systems to improve overall efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct field surveys or study maps, graphs, diagrams, or other data to identify and correct power system problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design electrical systems or components that minimize electric energy requirements, such as lighting systems designed to account for natural lighting.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
